identity: A Codex-native operating memory, eval, and control-plane layer.
product_boundary: KRN is not a prompt pack, docs-memory folder, or dashboard-first app. It is useful only if a multi-layer memory/control system, evals, hooks, MCP/API, and a review dashboard measurably reduce repeated Codex failure modes.
guardrails: OpenAI/Codex behavior requires official docs first.
Skills are measured interventions, not productivity proof.
Dashboard work starts only after stable objects exist.
MCP/API writes are append-only, idempotent, schema-backed, and reviewable.
